name: deepseek-ocr
description: Convert documents to markdown, extract raw text, and locate specific content

image.description: Input image to perform OCR on (supports documents, charts, tables, etc.)
image.title: Image

reference_text.description: Reference text to locate in the image (only used for 'Locate Object by Reference' task). Example: 'the teacher', '20-10', 'a red car'
reference_text.title: Reference Text

resolution_size.description: Model resolution size - affects speed and accuracy trade-off
resolution_size.title: resolution_size

task_type.description: Type of OCR task to perform
task_type.title: task_type
